title: Senior Instructional Designer at Great Learning

jsonLd.title: Senior Instructional Designer at Great Learning
jsonLd.description:
Great Learning, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Patna operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Great Learning:
Great Learning is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Great Learning!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
